title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at CRISIL

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at CRISIL
jsonLd.description:
CRISIL is actively seeking a talented and motivated Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Ludhiana. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About CRISIL:
CRISIL is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CRISIL!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
